exclusions.note: Avoid direct overlap with currently visible q=bsc skills.

skills.name: Binance Price Snapshot
skills.summary: Pulls latest spot price + 24h stats for one symbol.
skills.overlapPolicy: No token launch, no NFT, no Pancake trading.

skills.name: Top Movers Radar
skills.summary: Ranks strongest/weakest movers in USDT pairs.

skills.name: Kline Brief
skills.summary: Returns compact OHLC trend summary from recent candles.
skills.overlapPolicy: No portfolio tracking; market data only.

skills.name: Funding Watch
skills.summary: Reads current futures funding and mark price for one symbol.
skills.overlapPolicy: No order placement, no futures execution.

skills.name: Symbol Status Checker
skills.summary: Checks if a symbol is actively tradable and returns filters.
skills.overlapPolicy: No meme launch; exchange rules only.

skills.name: Four.Meme Agent Skill
skills.summary: Installs and enables the upstream fourmeme CLI so Hub agents can run create/buy/sell/send flows via chat.
skills.overlapPolicy: Allows curated meme launches while other swap/portfolio tracks stay paused.

skills.name: Four.Meme Create Pipeline
skills.summary: Two-step create flow for Four.meme token launch (create-api -> create-chain) with mandatory confirmation gates.
skills.overlapPolicy: Guide mode only; no automatic chain writes without explicit confirmation.

skills.name: Four.Meme Trade Playbook
skills.summary: Quote-first buy/sell execution guardrails for Four.meme with slippage and loss limits.
skills.overlapPolicy: No autonomous hot-wallet loop; human confirmation required for every order.

skills.name: Four.Meme Agentic Ops
skills.summary: Human-in-the-loop agentic loop for candidate discovery, scoring, execution, and monitoring on Four.meme.
skills.overlapPolicy: Assistive mode by default; no unattended execution.

skills.name: Four.Meme One-Stop BSC
skills.summary: One-stop BSC playbook for Four.meme launch, buy or sell, ERC8004 identity prep, and fast auth with revoke controls.
skills.overlapPolicy: BSC-only and human-confirmed writes; no unattended hot-wallet automation.

skills.name: ERC8004 Fast Auth
skills.summary: Quick authorization and revoke checklist for ERC-8004 agent identity based on ERC-721 operator model.
skills.overlapPolicy: Least-privilege scope and short TTL; always include revoke step.

openSourceCandidates.name: binance-mcp-server (public data flavor)
openSourceCandidates.adaptPlan: Strip account/trading tools, keep fast market-data endpoints for playground.

openSourceCandidates.name: BinanceMCPServer
openSourceCandidates.why: Mature tool surface and good starter architecture.
openSourceCandidates.adaptPlan: Keep tool schema, replace execution layer with your API gateway.

openSourceCandidates.name: trading-signals-mcp
openSourceCandidates.adaptPlan: Use indicator transforms only, ship as analysis-only skill pack.

openSourceCandidates.name: crypto-liquidations-mcp
openSourceCandidates.why: Real-time liquidation stream for volatility alert skills.
openSourceCandidates.adaptPlan: Add watchlists + alert formatting for your playground response cards.

openSourceCandidates.name: bsc-honeypot-detector
openSourceCandidates.why: Fast BSC token risk checks with multi-DEX liquidity simulation.
openSourceCandidates.adaptPlan: Package as a safety skill; exclude any swap execution workflow.
